[DQC.US.0120.9578] The extensible list item OperatingLeaseLiabilityNoncurrentStatementOfFinancialPositionExtensibleList has a value of OperatingLeaseLiabilityNoncurrent. This item refers to the location of this item in the financial statements. However, the concept OperatingLeaseLiabilityNoncurrent does not appear in the presentation role 0002 - Statement - CONSOLIDATED BALANCE SHEETS. Either update the value of the extensible list item OperatingLeaseLiabilityNoncurrentStatementOfFinancialPositionExtensibleList with the correct balance sheet element or add the balance sheet line item OperatingLeaseLiabilityNoncurrent to the presentation linkbase in the balance sheet role.
The format of the value in the extensible list has to be namespace-uri#concept-name an example is as follows:
http://fasb.org/us-gaap/2023#PropertyPlantAndEquipmentNet
Element : OperatingLeaseLiabilityNoncurrentStatementOfFinancialPositionExtensibleList Value : OperatingLeaseLiabilityNoncurrent Period : 2024-12-31
Rule Element Id:9578 Rule version: 29.0.2 - SPCB_instance_2024_2025.xml 19378

[DQC.US.0120.9578] The extensible list item OperatingLeaseRightOfUseAssetStatementOfFinancialPositionExtensibleList has a value of OtherAssets. This item refers to the location of this item in the financial statements. However, the concept OtherAssets does not appear in the presentation role 0002 - Statement - CONSOLIDATED BALANCE SHEETS. Either update the value of the extensible list item OperatingLeaseRightOfUseAssetStatementOfFinancialPositionExtensibleList with the correct balance sheet element or add the balance sheet line item OtherAssets to the presentation linkbase in the balance sheet role.
The format of the value in the extensible list has to be namespace-uri#concept-name an example is as follows:
http://fasb.org/us-gaap/2023#PropertyPlantAndEquipmentNet
Element : OperatingLeaseRightOfUseAssetStatementOfFinancialPositionExtensibleList Value : OtherAssets Period : 2024-12-31
